PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Off Calendar

Petition For 1. Order Compelling First And Full Account By Personal Representative; 2. Removal Of Executor For Good Cause
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jason Louie for Jian Yi Hu (Petitioner). Andrew Schultz for Bertha Joung (Trustee). Cynthia Lee for King Hon Ho and Nuen Ying Yung (Beneficiaries). Warren Woo for Myra Chan Lui (Executor).

The Court had signed the order to compell and file the accounting and granted the amount of $475.00 in attorneys fees. The removal is not granted. The Court stated that the Petition For Instructions should be filed in the trust.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Bonner.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Off Calendar

Petition For 1. Order Compelling First And Full Account By Personal Representative; 2. Removal Of Executor For Good Cause
Off Calendar Sep-19-2007 Continued To Nov-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Warren Woo appearing for and with executor Myra Chan. Charles Ling is in court. Jason Louie appearing for and with petition Jian Yi Hu. Cynthia Lee appearing for two beneficiaries who reside in Hong Kong. Mr. Woo informed the Court that he has filed the Petition for Instructions this morning. Hearing is set on 11/6. Mr. Louie requested for attorney fees for his efforts to get to this point. Mr. Woo argued that the executor has marshalled the bank account and it is in the record. Court allowed attorney's fee for Mr. Louie. Mr. Woo argued that he just received the declaration and he wanted an opportunity to sumbit opposition. Court agreed to give him until Friday 9/21 to file opposition. The Court will also determine who will pay the attorney's fee. Court also ordered an accounting by the executor to be filed on or before 10/31. Status for filing of the accounting is set on 10/31. Appearance is not required if the accounting is filed. This matter is continued to 11/6.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Petition For 1. Order Compelling First And Full Account By Personal Representative; 2. Removal Of Executor For Good Cause
Off Calendar Aug-22-2007 Continued To Sep-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Warren Woo appearing for and with executor Myra Chan. Charles Lin is in court. Cynthia Lee appearing for two beneficiaries. Andrew Schultz appearing for trustee Bertha Joung. Jason Louie appearing for petitioner. Oral argument presented by Mr. Louie and responded by Mr. Woo. Mr. Schultz made a statement regarding the bank account. Mr. Woo responded on that issue. Court instructed Mr. Woo to file a Petition for Instructions to include all matter that have not been resolved. Matter is continued to 9/19. Attorney's fees issue is continued to 9/19. Matter is continued to 9/19.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Lee.
